## Description
Please describe the changes in this pull request and the problems/features they address.

## Related Issues
Closes #

## Visual Adjustments (Screenshots/Recordings)
Please attach any relevant images or video clips demonstrating frontend changes.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] DevOps/CI/CD, dependencies, or documentation update

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this repository.
- [ ] I have ran static type checks (`npm run typecheck`) and resolved all issues.
- [ ] I have executed the linter (`npm run lint`) and fixed warnings.
- [ ] All unit tests pass cleanly (`npm run test:run`).
- [ ] I have performed a local production build check (`npm run build`).
- [ ] New and existing tests pass locally with my changes.
